name: module-federation-react-example
description: Module Federation React example with shared UI components and libraries

scripts.dev: bash -c "pnpm -C host dev & pnpm -C remote dev & wait"
scripts.build: pnpm -C host build && pnpm -C remote build
scripts.test: pnpm run build && pnpm run optimize && vitest run
scripts.test:ui: pnpm run build && pnpm run optimize && vitest --ui
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm run build && pnpm run optimize && vitest run --coverage
scripts.test:unit: pnpm run build && pnpm run optimize && vitest run test/unit
scripts.test:integration: pnpm run build && pnpm run optimize && vitest run test/integration
scripts.test:e2e:dev: pnpm run dev & sleep 10 && pnpm run optimize:dev && npx playwright test && kill %1
scripts.test:watch: pnpm run build && pnpm run optimize && vitest --watch
scripts.clean: rimraf dist coverage host/dist remote/dist node_modules/.cache
scripts.build:dev: pnpm -C host build --mode development && pnpm -C remote build --mode development
scripts.dev:optimized: pnpm run build:dev && pnpm run optimize:dev && pnpm run serve
